achievements.title: Buster BIOS
achievements.description: THE FOLLOWING BIOS SETTINGS ARE REQUIRED:  Player = 03, Level = NOMAL or Higher, Extend 4th = 1,000,000.
achievements.author: SubliminalSiren

achievements.description: Obtain the Forcefield Powerup.
